answer: I cannot find this in the provided rules if a Druid can wear metal armor while wearing or wielding a magic item, specifically a holy symbol. The text only states that a holy symbol must be held, worn visibly, or borne on a shield for a cleric or paladin to use it as a spellcasting focus. There is no mention of any restrictions on wearing metal armor alongside a holy symbol or any other magic item. Therefore, the context does not provide enough information to determine if a Druid can wear metal armor while using a holy symbol as a focus.
